name: Nireco Corporation
summary: Nireco Corporation provides process control, Web control, and inspection systems in Japan. It offers control and measuring systems, including electro-hydraulic actuators, eddy current level meters, thickness measuring systems, metal industry related edge position control systems, and automatic marking systems for steel and non-ferrous metal production lines. The company also provides Web control products, which include printing film related edge position control systems, tension control systems, automatic register control systems, print-to-cut register control systems, printing quality inspection systems, and gluing control systems. In addition, it offers inspection systems, such as defect inspection systems for plain surfaces, pouch packaging inspection systems, near-infrared ray analysis systems, image processing and analysis systems, and fruit and vegetable quality analysis systems, as well as fish selectors. The company was formerly known as Nippon Regulator Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Nireco Corporation in November 1984. Nireco Corporation was founded in 1931 and is headquartered in Hachioji, Japan.
